articles.title: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
articles.summary: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let s keep in mind that India s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China s is half of that compared to the US.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Taking Stock: Market fails to hold on to day s gains, ends marginally higher
articles.summary: Grasim Industries, Bharti Airtel, Nestle India, Maruti Suzuki and HCL Technologies were the biggest Nifty gainers, while losers included Sun Pharma, BPCL, Reliance Industries, MM and Hindalco Industries
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Agri Picks Report: Geojit
articles.summary: According to Geojit, Rubber prices rose nearly 10% over the past three-four weeks and hit a record high of 140 rupees a kg due to pent-up demand after easing of the pandemic induced lockdowns amid a supply crunch.

articles.title: Oil prices slip as growing stockpiles signal bumpy fuel demand recovery
articles.summary: U.S. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude futures fell 20 cents, or 0.5%, to $37.85 a barrel at 0056 GMT, after climbing 3.5% on Wednesday.

articles.title: US EIA cuts 2020 world oil demand growth forecast
articles.summary: In its monthly forecast, the agency cut its oil demand growth estimate for 2021 by 490,000 bpd to 6.53 million bpd.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Gold flat as dollar strength counters safe-haven demand
articles.summary: Spot gold was little changed at $1,929.30 per ounce by 0038 GMT, after falling to a near two-week week low of $1,906.24 on Tuesday.

articles.title: Oil falls further amid growing alarm over coronavirus second wave
articles.summary: The biggest global health crisis in a century continues to flare unabated with cases rising in India, Great Britain, Spain and several parts of the United States, where the infection rate has not come under control for months.

articles.title: Energy Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Oil prices hit a rough patch last week, falling back in line with broader financial markets. Prices did try to inch higher, but experienced selling pressure at highs.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Precious Metals Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Gold fell to the lowest level in a month primarily as the dollar rose against its major crosses and better-than-expected economic number from the US.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Base Metals Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Base metals traded choppy last week, with prices hitting multi month highs at the start of the week and followed by some profit taking on back of volatility in the dollar and mixed data signals from China and US.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Expert view: A smooth rally unlikely in short term; markets not out of macro woods, says Rishabh Nahar of Qode Advisors
articles.summary: Expert view: Rishabh Nahar from Qode Advisors offers a cautious outlook on the Indian stock market's future amid geopolitical tensions and economic factors. He advocates for a gradual, earnings-led approach rather than expecting a smooth rally.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Advit Jewels share price hits 5% lower circuit after bumper debut. Should you buy, sell or hold?
articles.summary: Advit Jewels shares surged on debut, listing at ₹187 on BSE and ₹188.90 on NSE, marking gains over the IPO price of ₹138. Despite hitting a 5% lower circuit, shares remain above IPO price by 30.04% on NSE and 28.73% on BSE.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: CSM Technologies IPO listing tomorrow. Here's what GMP signals ahead of debut
articles.summary: CSM Technologies IPO was open for subscription on June 24 and closed on June 29.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: India sits out the global bull run in the first half of 2026
articles.summary: Indian equities logged their worst first-half performance since 2022, with the Nifty falling 8.7% as war-driven volatility, record foreign outflows and an AI-led IT sector rout weighed on sentiment. Domestic institutional buying of ₹4.63 trillion cushioned the blow.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Manufacturing PMI: Inflation pressure is receding, so is growth
articles.summary: Moderating crude prices, if sustained, is a relief for overall inflation and even for manufacturers. However, slow progress of the southwest monsoon could emerge as a demand headwind
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Samir Arora of Helios Capital backs SIPs, challenges critics: 'Prove market timing works'
articles.summary: SIPs are popular among retail investors for building wealth, but debates on market timing arise during volatility. Fund manager Samir Arora challenges SIP critics to prove that timing works, suggesting they demonstrate successful examples of such strategies instead.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Cartrade Tech share price jumps 6%. Nomura sees more big upside
articles.summary: Cartrade share price opened at ₹2,701 per share today, as compared to previous close of ₹2,693 on Tuesday. The stock touched an intraday high of ₹2,870 on NSE on 1 July.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stocks to buy for the long term: Axis Bank, Delhivery among Ventura's top picks with 19% to 58% upside
articles.summary: Vinit Bolinjkar of Ventura shares top stock picks for the long term, highlighting companies like Ather Energy and Axis Bank. With potential upsides between 19%-58%, these picks are solid bets for investors looking to navigate turbulent waters and capitalise on emerging opportunities.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Route Mobile share price jumps after partnership with Truecaller
articles.summary: Route Mobile surged nearly 7% after announcing a partnership with Truecaller to enhance its Business Messaging platform. This collaboration aims to improve customer engagement by leveraging Truecaller's user base and messaging capabilities, enabling secure interactions through various media formats.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: RailTel share price rallies 5.5% on new order win worth ₹108 crore . Do you own?
articles.summary: RailTel share price opened at ₹311 apiece on NSE today, as compared to previous close of ₹307.95 on Tuesday.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Reliance Power share price soars 18% as AI push sparks rally; stock snaps 4-day losing streak
articles.summary: Reliance Power's share price rose over 18% to ₹24.84 after announcing steps to integrate AI and new technology within its subsidiaries, ending a four-day losing streak. The company reported a consolidated net loss for Q4, contrasting with a net profit in the same quarter last year.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Jivial Industries share price slips over 3% after lacklustre debut
articles.summary: Jivial Industries experienced a weak debut on BSE SME, opening at ₹156.80, a 20% discount from its issue price of ₹196. The IPO, which closed with a 93% subscription, featured a total issue size of ₹31.99 crore.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Crazy Snacks IPO share allotment in focus: GMP, steps to check status online
articles.summary: Investors who bet on the IPO can check the share allotment status online on the registrar's website. They can also check the share allotment status on the official websites of the BSE.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Income tax relief impact? Foreign investors flock to Indian bonds, pump record ₹25,800 crore in June
articles.summary: Foreign investment in Indian government bonds hit a record ₹25,800 crore in June, driven by tax exemptions and hopes for index inclusion. This marked a significant increase over the ₹14,600 crore invested from January to May, showcasing enhanced appetite for India's fixed-income assets.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Shreedhar Spinners IPO listing: Shares hit upper price band after a positive debut; details here
articles.summary: Shares of Shreedhar Spinners made a positive debut and extended gains to hit their upper price band on the NSE SME on Wednesday, 1 July. Shreedhar Spinners IPO opened for public subscription on Tuesday, 23 June, and concluded on Thursday, 25 June.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Zee Entertainment share price jumps over 8% ahead of board meeting to consider and approve raising of funds
articles.summary: Zee Entertainment's share price surged over 8% after announcing a board meeting on July 1, 2026, to explore fundraising options, including equity shares issuance and convertible securities. The plan depends on shareholder and regulatory approvals.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Waterways Leisure Tourism share price lists at a 16% discount to the issue price; details here
articles.summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO: The stock opened at ₹681 apiece on NSE and ₹690 on BSE. This means that the IPO allottees made a loss of 15.72% over the Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO listing.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Advit Jewels makes stellar debut; shares list at ₹188.90, a premium of 36.88% from IPO price
articles.summary: Advit Jewels made robust debut on stock markets, listing at ₹188.90 apiece on NSE, a premium of 36.88% over its issue price of ₹138. Meanwhile, on BSE, it debuted at ₹187, rallying 35.51
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Rekha Jhunjhunwala portfolio stock VA Tech Wabag jumps over 6% after announcing an order win; details here
articles.summary: Rekha Jhunjhunwala's portfolio stock, VA Tech Wabag, jumped more than 6% in morning trade on Wednesday, 1 July. As per BSE data, VA Tech Wabag shares have surged 325% and 500% in three years and five years, respectively.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mazagon Dock to Torrent Pharma - Jay Thakkar suggests 3 stocks to buy or sell for short-term in F&O segment
articles.summary: Indian benchmark indices opened higher on gains from auto stocks, with the Nifty 50 rising 0.22% and BSE Sensex advancing 0.26%. Investor sentiment remained cautious due to stalled US-Iran talks, while Nifty 50 trades within a range between 23,600 and 24,200.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: KPIT Tech share price crashes 15% on weaker Q1 business update. Buy or sell?
articles.summary: KPIT Technologies share price fell over 15% to ₹570.80 apiece in Wednesday's trading session after the company announced its preliminary business update on Q1 FY27.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Zee Media raises ₹19.12 crore as Singapore-based FII ups stake to 3.33%; converts 3 crore warrants into equity shares
articles.summary: Zee Media Corporation raised ₹19.12 crore by allotting 3 crore equity shares to Sun India Opportunities Fund after the investor exercised conversion rights on warrants. This increases the company's share capital to ₹65.54 crore, with the stock rising 1% post-announcement.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Knack Packaging IPO opens today: GMP jumps! Price, subscription status to review. Apply or not?
articles.summary: Knack Packaging IPO GMP today has risen from ₹5 to ₹15, say market observers
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Rupee opens 2 paise lower at 94.68 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee opened lower at 94.68 against the US dollar due to weaker Asian currencies and higher US Treasury yields. Despite pressures, RBI interventions have limited declines. A potential India-US trade agreement may boost investor confidence and support the rupee's outlook.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold price today: Gold rate falls 1%, silver crashes 2% on MCX on a stronger dollar, Fed rate-hike bets
articles.summary: As per MCX, domestic spot gold prices dropped by ₹15,100, or nearly 10%, in June to come to ₹1,40,864 per 10 grams, while silver rates declined by ₹38,250, or almost 15%, in June to settle at ₹2,25,125 per kg on 30 June.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: MFs wary of Sebi plan to allow celeb ads, cite mis-selling, edge for big entities
articles.summary: Sebi's proposal to let mutual fund houses use celebrity endorsements has sparked a debate over investor protection and competition. While supporters say it could bring in more first-time investors, critics fear higher mis-selling risks and a growing advantage for large fund houses.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Here are the stocks where the government could do OFS
articles.summary: Strong government ownership and divestment targets could put these PSU stocks on the radar for OFS.

articles.title: Aastha Spintex IPO Day 3: Last day to buy; check GMP, subscription status, and other details - Apply or not?
articles.summary: The Aastha Spintex IPO opened for subscription on June 29, seeking ₹170 crore by issuing 1.25 crore shares at ₹125-136 each. The IPO allotment is on July 2, and shares are anticipated to list on July 6 on BSE and NSE.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, Coal India among shares in focus today; check list here
articles.summary: Stock market today: On Tuesday, Sensex fell 249.70 points, or 0.33%, to end at 76,478.67, while the Nifty 50 declined 80.50 points, or 0.34%, to settle at 23,865.75.

articles.title: Stock market today: Gift Nifty hints flat start; US-Iran talks, weak yen to crude oil prices - 8 stocks to buy or sell
articles.summary: The Indian stock market may open quietly on Wednesday, influenced by global market trends. Domestic indices dropped yesterday, with the Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex both closing lower. Oil prices rose slightly amid ongoing geopolitical tensions between the US and Iran.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Buy or sell: Gift Nifty signals positive start, Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today — 1 July 2026
articles.summary: Buy or sell: Vaishali Parekh recommends three stocks to buy today — Suzlon Energy, Marksans Pharma, and Cochin Shipyard
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil prices gain amid US-Iran talks uncertainty; Brent crude at $73 per barrel
articles.summary: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures gained 50 cents, or 0.69%, to $73.45 a barrel, while US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude rose 63 cents, or 0.91%, to $70.13 a barrel.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Asian stocks today: Nikkei 225, Kospi rise more than 1% on US tech rally, optimism over US-Iran talks
articles.summary: Asian stocks today: Japan's Nikkei 225 climbed 1.79%, while the broader Topix index gained 1.07%. South Korea's Kospi advanced 1.52%, although the small-cap Kosdaq slipped 0.42%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO listing today: Here's what GMP indicates ahead of stock market debut
articles.summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO is set to list today at 10:00 IST after receiving a muted response, subscribing 1.46 times overall. Retail participation was strong, with shares expected to list at a discount of 6.31% below the IPO price of ₹808.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: From Gift Nifty, US-Iran talks to fall in Japanese Yen: 8 key things that changed for Indian stock market overnight
articles.summary: Gift Nifty was trading around 23,994 level, a discount of nearly 16 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close, indicating a negative start for the Indian stock market indices.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India's richest cities: urban affairs ministry is on a quest to assess economic output of cities for first time
articles.summary: The Indian government is creating a standardized methodology to estimate the economic output of cities, known as City Economic Product. The initiative aims to quantify urban economic contributions, aiding in planning and investment, as urban areas contribute nearly 70% of India's economic output.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: GST collections rise 14% to ₹1.95 trillion in June, as tax revenue from imports soars
articles.summary: June GST collections suggest economic activity remained resilient despite global uncertainties, with higher imports and steady domestic transactions supporting tax revenues.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India, Japan eye LNG stockpiling partnership amid global supply uncertainty as Sanae Takaichi arrives today: Report
articles.summary: India and Japan are set to sign an LNG supply deal as PM Sanae Takaichi arrives for a summit with PM Narendra Modi. The agreement aims to address global supply chain disruptions caused by the US-Iran conflict, establishing a joint task force for LNG stockpiling.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Economy holds firm, but risks remain from monsoon and geopolitics, says govt's economic review
articles.summary: The West Asia conflict and deficient monsoon rainfall so far underscore the need to reorient India's agricultural pricing policies to incentivise the cultivation of climate-resilient crops
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India's fiscal deficit at 9.6% of FY27 target in May
articles.summary: The government has budgeted a fiscal deficit of 4.3% of GDP, or about ₹16.96 trillion, for FY27 and is expected to rely on stronger tax collections and non-tax receipts in the coming months to keep the deficit within the target.
articles.label: BEARISH
